Package com.github.roboboredom.CSC251Project

Class CPolicy

java.lang.Object
com.github.roboboredom.CSC251Project.CPolicy
public class CPolicy extends Object
Models an insurance policy for one person.
  • An instance of this class holds an insurance policy for one person

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    CPolicy.m_ESmokingStatus
    Available policy holder smoking statuses

  • Constructor Details

    • CPolicy

      public CPolicy()
      Instantiate a new insurance policy object with defaults

    • CPolicy

      public CPolicy(int iPolicyNumber, String sProviderName, String sPolicyHolderFirstName, String sPolicyHolderLastName, int iPolicyHolderAge, CPolicy.m_ESmokingStatus ePolicyHolderSmokingStatus, double dPolicyHolderHeightInches, double dPolicyHolderWeightPounds)
      Instantiate a new insurance policy object.
      Parameters:
      iPolicyNumber - ID of the insurance policy
      sProviderName - Name of the insurance company providing the policy to the holder
      sPolicyHolderFirstName - Policy holder's first name
      sPolicyHolderLastName - Policy holder's last name
      iPolicyHolderAge - Policy holder's age
      ePolicyHolderSmokingStatus - Policy holder smoking status.
      • See CPolicy.m_ESmokingStatus for possible states.
      dPolicyHolderHeightInches - Policy holder height, in inches
      dPolicyHolderWeightPounds - Policy holder weight, in pounds

      Gets the ID of the insurance policy.

      Gets the policy holder's age.

      Gets the policy holder's smoking status.
      Returns:
      The policy holder's smoking status

    • fGetPolicyHolderHeightInches

      public double fGetPolicyHolderHeightInches()
      Gets the policy holder's height, in inches.
      Returns:
      The policy holder's height, in inches

    • fGetPolicyHolderWeightPounds

      public double fGetPolicyHolderWeightPounds()
      Gets the policy holder's weight, in pounds.
      Returns:
      The policy holder's weight, in pounds

    • fCalculatePolicyHolderBMI

      public double fCalculatePolicyHolderBMI()
      Calculates the policy holder's BMI.
      • The formula is 
        m_dPolicyHolderWeightPounds * 703.0D / Math.pow(m_dPolicyHolderHeightInches, 2.0D)
      Returns:
      The BMI of the policy holder

    • fCalculateInsurancePolicyPrice

      public double fCalculateInsurancePolicyPrice()
      Calculates the policy holder's insurance policy price.
      • The base fee is F_dINSURANCE_POLICY_BASE_FEE
      • If the policyholder's age is greater than F_iINSURANCE_POLICY_AGE_FEE_THRESHOLD, there is an added fee of F_dINSURANCE_POLICY_AGE_FEE
      • If the policyholder is a smoker, there is an added fee of F_dINSURANCE_POLICY_SMOKER_FEE
      • If the policyholder's BMI is greater than F_dINSURANCE_POLICY_BMI_FEE_THRESHOLD, there is an added fee using the formula 
        (dPolicyHolderBMI - F_dINSURANCE_POLICY_BMI_FEE_THRESHOLD) * F_dINSURANCE_POLICY_BMI_FEE_MULTIPLIER
      Returns:
      The the policy holder's insurance policy price
